title: Pasania calathiformis

intro: Pasania calathiformis, also known as the Calathiform Pasania, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Lauraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pasania calathiformis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
